description: A guest places an order for two pizzas and two sodas through the venue's mobile app for pickup at a specific concession stand.

nodes.task_description: Receive the incoming mobile order on the kitchen display system (KDS).

expected_outcome.expected: The new order appears on the KDS at the designated pizza stand.

nodes.task_description: The kitchen staff prepares the order.
Mark the order as 'Ready for Pickup' on the KDS.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent updates the order status.

nodes.task_description: Send a push notification to the guest's mobile app informing them that their order is ready.

expected_outcome.expected: The guest receives a notification on their phone.
